rationale: The citing paper is an editorial synthesis that explicitly maps and integrates prior/special-issue work on how media source and modality affect marketing outcomes, and the cited paper directly provides multimethod evidence on print vs. digital medium effects on memory. Given this strong topical and conceptual alignment (medium effects, encoding/retrieval mechanisms), the citation is plausibly being used as substantive support rather than a purely incidental mention, even though only a DOI-level match is available.
